calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-23-2023 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-28-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of The Final Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Sep-27-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-04-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Teresa I. Sanchez Adams, via Zoom, in propria persona, Petitioner.

The court confirms with Ms. Adams that she lives in Sacramento and that the agreement between her siblings and her is to not sell the estate's real property. The court and Ms. Adams discuss what her duties will be and what the court will expect of her if she is appointed as Administrator, including, but not limited to, not commingling estate assets and making distributions of estate assets without court approval.

After additional discussion, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration. Teresa I. Sanchez Adams is appointed Administrator of the Estate with limited authority. Bond is not required. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. A Status of Filing of the Final Inventory and Appraisal is set for Sep-27-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. A Status on Close of Estate is set for May-23-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Andam. Not Reported.
